title: Oriental Fantasy 3D Cg Hand Invitation Beauty Portrait
sourceTitle: Oriental Fantasy 3D CG Hand Invitation Beauty Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 9:16 high-precision 3D CG oriental fantasy beauty portrait of adult oriental fairytale fantasy woman with cream-gold long hair, soft violet-blue eyes, porcelain skin, and gentle romantic smile in a romantic first-person invitation scene. Subject: adult oriental fairytale fantasy woman with cream-gold long hair, soft violet-blue eyes, porcelain skin, and gentle romantic smile is clearly adult, about 20 to 24 visually, with refined East Asian fantasy features, cream-blonde long hair with mint-blue highlights, airy bangs, delicate braids, small loop ponytail detail, and pearl butterfly hair clip, clear purple-blue and pink-violet eyes, soft peach lips, and white and ice-blue oriental fantasy light dress with satin, tulle, translucent organza, pale blue ribbons, bows, and crystal earrings. Scene: dream garden greenhouse and sunset flower corridor courtyard creates a dreamy romantic oriental fantasy atmosphere with pale gold arches, soft pink roses, white vines, gauze curtains, glass windows, drifting petals, and warm depth haze. Composition: Thigh-up close framing with slight first-person interaction perspective; thigh-up near-camera interactive portrait with direct gentle gaze, shy smile, and approachable romantic posture, the other hand lightly holds the dress, face and upper body remain clear, and hands are natural with correct proportions. Signature Elements: Preserved oriental fantasy 3d cg hand invitation beauty portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: High-completion 3D CG character render, anime-style semi-realistic character art, Unreal Engine quality, Octane render look, PBR materials, subsurface scattering skin, glossy satin, translucent chiffon, polished anime realism, premium virtual character portrait. Color Palette: Milk white, pale gold, soft pink, ice blue, mint cyan, cream-blonde hair, pearl glow, and clean romantic floral tones. Lighting: Soft golden sunset natural light with slight backlight, bright translucent face lighting, delicate rim light on hair, shoulders, neck, and hand, volumetric glow, cinematic depth of field, and soft bloom. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
